image:image.image:title: Der Fußabdruck der Gegenwart
image:image.image:caption: Nur wo du zu Fuß warst, bist du auch wirklich gewesen.

image:image.image:title: Caminhos do Infinito
image:image.image:caption: Há um caminho para o mar E um caminho para o sol E um caminho para o vento E um caminho para o nada.

image:image.image:title: De Chromatische Schakel
image:image.image:caption: Er is geen blauw zonder geel en zonder oranje, en als je blauw gebruikt, dan moet je ook geel en oranje gebruiken, nietwaar?

image:image.image:title: Limiar do Infinito
image:image.image:caption: Onde as nuvens encontram a terra, lá começa o céu.

image:image.image:title: Infinite Grains
image:image.image:caption: To see a World in a Grain of Sand And a Heaven in a Wild Flower, Hold Infinity in the palm of your hand And Eternity in an hour.

image:image.image:title: Éclat d'Automne
image:image.image:caption: L'automne est un deuxième printemps où chaque feuille est une fleur.

image:image.image:title: Corazón del Abismo
image:image.image:caption: En el mar, el pulpo... es la flor del abismo.

image:image.image:title: Stille Weisheit
image:image.image:caption: Berge sind stumme Lehrer und machen schweigsame Schüler.

image:image.image:title: Ver e Amar
image:image.image:caption: Olho para as coisas e não as penso. Que pensaria eu das coisas? Não as penso, vejo-as e amo-as.

image:image.image:title: Regard du Cœur
image:image.image:caption: On ne voit bien qu'avec le cœur. L'essentiel est invisible pour les yeux.

image:image.image:title: Sendas del Alma
image:image.image:caption: Caminante, son tus huellas el camino y nada más; Caminante, no hay camino, se hace camino al andar.

image:image.image:title: Espelho Dourado
image:image.image:caption: O mar é o espelho onde o sol se deita.

image:image.image:title: O Olhar do Sábio
image:image.image:caption: As coisas mais simples são as mais extraordinárias, e só os sábios conseguem vê-las.

image:image.image:title: Celestial Cutlery
image:image.image:caption: The Lightning is a yellow Fork From Tables in the Sky By inadvertent fingers dropt The awful Cutlery

image:image.image:title: Path of Freedom
image:image.image:caption: Afoot and light-hearted I take to the open road, Healthy, free, the world before me, The long brown path before me leading wherever I choose.

image:image.image:title: Lex Animi
image:image.image:caption: Quod non vetat lex, hoc vetat fieri pudor.

image:image.image:title: Das Absolute aus Stein und Meer
image:image.image:caption: Alles ist Stein, und alles ist Meer,
